title: Ukraine Strikes St. Petersburg on First Day of a Marquee Putin Event
summary_full: As an annual economic conference was set to begin, President Volodymyr Zelensky said Ukraine had targeted a navy base and an oil terminal in the region that includes Russia’s second-largest city.
summary_public: As an annual economic conference was set to begin, President Volodymyr Zelensky said Ukraine had targeted a navy base and an oil terminal in the region that includes Russia’s second-largest city.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Ukraine Strikes St. Petersburg on First Day of a Marquee Putin Event

UA.label: positive
UA.evidence: Ukraine had targeted a navy base and an oil terminal
